schedule.dialogue: I've been researching ancient dungeon lore.
A walk among the shelves clears the mind.
The evening light is perfect for reading.

default: Welcome to the archives. Knowledge is power.
I've been cataloging monster behaviors from your expeditions.
The dungeon holds secrets older than the town itself.
Your adventures make for fascinating historical records.
I believe you'll find what you seek in the deepest floors.
lore: The Abyssal King was sealed away centuries ago...
Legend says the dungeon itself is a living entity.
